channel.title: Looker on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Looker on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Looker Source
item.description:
About

Looker is a web based business intelligence and data management tool that provides a semantic layer to facilitate querying. It can be deployed in the cloud, on GCP, or on premises.

Available Tools

Looker Source Tools

Tool Name Description
Create Git Branch Tool A "looker-create-git-branch" tool is used to create a new git branch for a LookML project.
Delete Git Branch Tool A "looker-delete-git-branch" tool is used to delete a git branch of a LookML project.
Get Git Branch Tool A "looker-get-git-branch" tool is used to retrieve the current git branch of a LookML project.
List Git Branches Tool A "looker-list-git-branches" tool is used to retrieve the list of available git branches of a LookML project.
looker-add-dashboard-element "looker-add-dashboard-element" creates a dashboard element in the given dashboard.
looker-add-dashboard-filter The "looker-add-dashboard-filter" tool adds a filter to a specified dashboard.
looker-conversational-analytics The "looker-conversational-analytics" tool will use the Conversational Analaytics API to analyze data from Looker
looker-create-agent Tool "looker-create-agent" creates a Looker Conversation Analytics agent.
looker-create-project-directory A "looker-create-project-directory" tool creates a new directory in a LookML project.
looker-create-project-file A "looker-create-project-file" tool creates a new LookML file in a project.
looker-delete-agent Tool "looker-delete-agent" deletes a Looker Conversation Analytics agent.
looker-delete-project-directory A "looker-delete-project-directory" tool deletes a directory from a LookML project.
looker-delete-project-file A "looker-delete-project-file" tool deletes a LookML file in a project.
looker-dev-mode A "looker-dev-mode" tool changes the current session into and out of dev mode
looker-generate-embed-url "looker-generate-embed-url" generates an embeddable URL for Looker content.
looker-get-agent Tool "looker-get-agent" retrieves a Looker Conversation Analytics agent.
looker-get-connection-databases A "looker-get-connection-databases" tool returns all the databases in a connection.
looker-get-connection-schemas A "looker-get-connection-schemas" tool returns all the schemas in a connection.
looker-get-connection-table-columns A "looker-get-connection-table-columns" tool returns all the columns for each table specified.
looker-get-connection-tables A "looker-get-connection-tables" tool returns all the tables in a connection.
looker-get-connections A "looker-get-connections" tool returns all the connections in the source.
looker-get-dashboards "looker-get-dashboards" tool searches for a saved Dashboard by name or description.
looker-get-dimensions A "looker-get-dimensions" tool returns all the dimensions from a given explore in a given model in the source.
looker-get-explores A "looker-get-explores" tool returns all explores for the given model from the source.
looker-get-filters A "looker-get-filters" tool returns all the filters from a given explore in a given model in the source.
looker-get-looks "looker-get-looks" searches for saved Looks in a Looker source.
looker-get-measures A "looker-get-measures" tool returns all the measures from a given explore in a given model in the source.
looker-get-models A "looker-get-models" tool returns all the models in the source.
looker-get-parameters A "looker-get-parameters" tool returns all the parameters from a given explore in a given model in the source.
looker-get-project-directories A "looker-get-project-directories" tool returns the directories within a specific LookML project.
looker-get-project-file A "looker-get-project-file" tool returns the contents of a LookML fle.
looker-get-project-files A "looker-get-project-files" tool returns all the LookML fles in a project in the source.
looker-get-projects A "looker-get-projects" tool returns all the LookML projects in the source.
looker-health-analyze "looker-health-analyze" provides a set of analytical commands for a Looker instance, allowing users to analyze projects, models, and explores.
looker-health-pulse "looker-health-pulse" performs health checks on a Looker instance, with multiple actions available (e.g., checking database connections, dashboard performance, etc).
looker-health-vacuum "looker-health-vacuum" provides a set of commands to audit and identify unused LookML objects in a Looker instance.
looker-list-agents Tool "looker-list-agents" retrieves the list of Looker Conversation Analytics agents.
looker-make-dashboard "looker-make-dashboard" generates a Looker dashboard in the users personal folder in Looker
looker-make-look "looker-make-look" generates a Looker look in the users personal folder in Looker
looker-query "looker-query" runs an inline query using the Looker semantic model.
looker-query-sql "looker-query-sql" generates a sql query using the Looker semantic model.
looker-query-url "looker-query-url" generates a url link to a Looker explore.
looker-run-dashboard "looker-run-dashboard" runs the queries associated with a dashboard.
looker-run-look "looker-run-look" runs the query associated with a saved Look.
looker-update-agent Tool "looker-update-agent" updates a Looker Conversation Analytics agent.
looker-update-project-file A "looker-update-project-file" tool updates the content of a LookML file in a project.
looker-validate-project A "looker-validate-project" tool checks the syntax of a LookML project and reports any errors
Switch Git Branch Tool A "looker-switch-git-branch" tool is used to switch the git branch of a LookML project.

Requirements

Looker User

This source only uses API authentication. You will need to create an API user to login to Looker.
